message:
fix: Atomic write in setup.go and TOCTOU race in CleanStaleLock

- setup.go: Replace os.WriteFile with atomic write pattern (temp+sync+rename)
  to prevent data corruption if write is interrupted

- profile.go: Fix TOCTOU race in CleanStaleLock where another process could
  create a new valid lock between our stale check and removal. Now re-verifies
  the lock file's PID matches before removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
